utorrent.reason: Has ads and trackers; same issues as BitTorrent; unsafe

bittorrent.reason: Has ads and trackers; same issues as uTorrent; unsafe

ccleaner.reason: Owned by Avast which has a history of questionable data practices

avast.reason: Notorious for collecting and selling user data

igg games / pc games torrents.reason: Doxxed GoodOldDownloads owner; packages own DRM in indie games; exploits users for ad revenue

steamunlocked.reason: Slow downloads; malicious link redirects; uploads stolen from IGG Games

gog unlocked.reason: Slow downloads; malicious link redirects; uploads stolen from IGG Games

sites with scene group names in url.reason: Scene groups do not have official websites; impersonators often bundle malware with releases
